_comment: Configuration for selecting, importing, solving, and submitting a LeetCode dataset.

_fields.dataset: Dataset name used to group imported problems, generated solutions, and results.
_fields.data_dir: Base directory where named datasets are stored.
_fields.start_id: First LeetCode problem number to include.
_fields.end_id: Last LeetCode problem number to include.
_fields.difficulties: Optional difficulty filter. Use [], or values like ["Easy"], ["Medium"], ["Hard"].
_fields.exclude_paid: If true, paid-only LeetCode problems are skipped.
_fields.limit: Maximum number of problems to import from the selected range. Use null for no explicit limit.
_fields.languages: LeetCode language slugs used for imported templates, generated solutions, and submissions.
_fields.model: OpenAI model used by submit-dataset to generate solutions.
_fields.submission_delay: Seconds to wait between LeetCode submissions.
